'''Gela Yeens''' was an ill-tempered [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who earned [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] by helping [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] collect his debts. Well respected for his uncanny anticipation in battle, Yeens was searching for [[Debnoli]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="CCG" /> Later, he accompanied Jabba the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], in the company of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], [[Boelo]], [[Unidentified henchman (Tatooine)|another human]] and a trio of [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]] to [[Docking Bay 94/Legends|Docking Bay 94]]. He and his fellow henchmen stood guard as Jabba confronted [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] about his debt.

==Behind the scenes==
Gela Yeens first appeared in a deleted scene from [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], which was released on [[May 25]], [[1977]]. The scene was added into the special edition of the movie, which was released in [[1997]]. The character was first named through the [[Decipher]] [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].
